name: I'm partially at fault for relying on Google AI Overview advice - can I still sue?
description: Yes, but reduced by your fault percentage.

mainEntity.name: I'm partially at fault for relying on Google AI Overview advice - can I still sue?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, but reduced by your fault percentage.
acceptedAnswer.description: Comparative fault reduces recovery; must prove Google's negligence outweighed yours.[4] No direct precedent. Key factors: Reliance reasonableness; warnings ignored. Assess with attorney.
